items.raw_excerpt: The complete story behind the 244-pound record Atlantic halibut caught through the ice at Saguenay Fjord in Canada.
items.summary_en: A Canadian angler caught a record 244-pound Atlantic halibut through the ice at Saguenay Fjord. The fish was taken for scientific research. It is the largest Atlantic halibut ever caught through ice.

items.raw_excerpt: Employees of Newfoundland and LabradorвҖҷs health authority recently received an email titled June Holiday thanking them for their hard work in recent months вҖ” only to find out it was all just a cybersecurity test. Now, the NLHS Digital Health Service CEO is apologizing, saying the email was "not sensitive."

items.raw_excerpt: FalleciГі en la noche del sГЎbado a la edad de 98 aГұos. HabГӯa emigrado a Argentina durante su juventud.

items.raw_excerpt: A court has suppressed the images of two women accused of graffitiing two RSLs in Melbourne for 12 months after their case is finalised.
items.summary_en: A court has banned media from showing the faces of two women accused of graffiti at two RSL clubs in Melbourne. The ban will last for 12 months after their case is finished.

items.title_en: Court hides faces of alleged RSL vandals

items.title_original: Media banned from showing faces of alleged RSL vandals

items.raw_excerpt: An der Generalversammlung der FRZ wurden drei neue Vorstandsmitglieder gewГӨhlt. Der Fokus wird verstГӨrkt auf Standortentwicklung und die FГ¶rderung junger FГјhrungskrГӨfte gelegt.
items.summary_en: The FRZ business network elected three new board members at its general meeting. It will put more focus on site development and support for young leaders.

items.raw_excerpt: It was a destination too good to be true.
items.summary_en: Tourists went to a small town after seeing an AI post about beautiful hot springs. When they arrived, they learned the place was not real.
items.summary_ko: кҙҖкҙ‘к°қл“Өмқҙ л©Ӣм§„ мҳЁмІңмқҙ мһҲлӢӨлҠ” мқёкіөм§ҖлҠҘ кІҢмӢңл¬јмқ„ ліҙкі  мһ‘мқҖ л§Ҳмқ„мқ„ м°ҫм•ҳлӢӨ. н•ҳм§Җл§Ң лҸ„м°©н•ң л’Ө к·ё мһҘмҶҢк°Җ мӢӨм ңлЎңлҠ” м—ҶлӢӨлҠ” мӮ¬мӢӨмқ„ м•ҢкІҢ лҗҗлӢӨ.

items.summary_en: A company in Kanazawa will open Tooryanse Kanazawa Foodlabo in the Katamachi shopping area on Dec. 13. The modern food stall village will have eight small shops, including a shrimp shop, a smoked food bar, Italian food, and local home-style dishes.

items.summary_en: Strabologna 2026 will open its city festival village in Bologna on Friday. For three days, Piazza Maggiore and Piazza Nettuno will host sports, games, activities, and surprises.

items.raw_excerpt: A South Australian government fund of more than $28 million for loans and grants for farmers has not been used for the past 10 years, despite the industry struggling through drought and poor market conditions.
items.summary_en: A South Australian government fund of more than $28 million for farmers has gone completely unused for the past decade. The money was meant for loans and grants to help farmers through drought and poor market conditions.
